author: xuafeng
name: QAT Int5/Int6 + TTT LoRA (non-record)
blurb: Non-record submission exploring two techniques on top of the #1 entry: (1) STE fake-quantization during training (int5 MLP, int6 attn) — discovered that post-training quant + SWA outperforms QAT by ~0.002 bpb. (2) TTT LoRA eval exploiting 430s of unused eval budget — implemented but untested due to budget. Best completed run: val_bpb 1.14476 (seed 1337).
